drawer.tapMapAdjust: Tap map or drag pin to adjust location
drawer.tempPassword: Use temporary password received via WhatsApp in 'Current password' field.

photo.dragCorners: Drag the 4 colored corners · Use slider to rotate

guide.title: JET OS Guide
guide.subtitle: {n} topics available for {role}
guide.footerDesc: Questions? Talk to your operation manager. This guide is personalized for your access as

passos.desc: Drag to move, pinch to zoom. Tap a station to see details.
Use TYPE (Pub/Priv/Comp) and STATUS buttons to filter stations.
Tap 🛰 on the buttons on the right side to enable satellite view.
Tap 🛴 to see GoJet scooters and parkings in real time.
passos.dica: Available for managers and admins only.

passos.desc: Tap the + button and then tap the map to place the pin.
Name, address, type (Public/Private/Competitor), status and field consultant.
Use Camera, Gallery or paste a URL. Photos are saved automatically.
Tap Add station. City is detected automatically from GPS.
In the station popup, tap Sketch to open the editor.
Drag the 4 colored corners to mark the station area.
Use the rotation slider to align correctly.
Tap Save with measurements. Dimensions are calculated automatically.
passos.dica: The sketch appears in the station PDF report.

passos.desc: Street View generates a photo of the station location using Google/Mapillary images. Useful when no field photo exists, giving a visual idea of the spot.
Click the station on the map → SV button. The system finds the best available image and shows a preview. Choose Save, Save + Measure or Discard.
passos.dica: The saved image shows a 🌐 SV badge in the popup, indicating it's not a real photo.

passos.desc: Click the 🛠 button (tools, right side) → 🌐. The system generates Street View for all stations without photos visible on the map, respecting active filters.
passos.dica: Use type and status filters first to generate only for the stations you need.

passos.desc: In the 🛠 button → ⚡. First generates Street View in batch, then automatically opens batch measurement mode for all stations with photo/SV without measurements.
passos.dica: Ideal for preparing an entire zone at once: generates photos and measures everything in sequence.

passos.desc: In the station popup, click 🌐 Street View to open the interactive Google Maps modal. Navigate the street, capture a frame and use it as the station photo.
passos.dica: Click 📸 Capture frame to open in a new window. Take a screenshot (Win+Shift+S) and paste with Ctrl+V.

passos.desc: Batch measurement mode opens a carousel with all stations that have a photo but no measurement. You measure one by one without going back to the map.
Click the 🛠 button (tools, right side) → 📐. The system filters visible stations on the map that have photo/SV but no measurement.
For each station, adjust the 4 corners of the area on the photo and click Save. The photo with measurements is saved automatically.
Use Skip ⏭ button (or → key) to go to the next one. Stop ✕ (or Esc key) ends the batch. Progress is shown in the bar at the top.
In any station's photo panel, you can paste a clipboard image with Ctrl+V or by clicking 📋 Paste. Useful for Street View screenshots.
passos.dica: Take a screenshot (Win+Shift+S on Windows, Cmd+Shift+4 on Mac), then paste directly in the app.

passos.desc: Buttons are stacked on the bottom-right of the map. From bottom to top: ➕ Add station, 🛰 Satellite, 🛠 Tools, 🛴 GoJet, ⏱ Shift.
Clicking 🛠 reveals 3 sub-buttons: ⚡ SV+Measure combo, 🌐 Batch SV generation, 📐 Batch measurement. Click 🛠 again to close.
passos.dica: Only visible for managers. Actions respect active type and status filters.

passos.desc: When 🛴 is active, sub-buttons appear: 📈 GoJet Analytics and 📊 GoJet Dashboard.
Opens the shift registration panel (clock in/out). Available for field operators, logistics and drivers.
Tap the 🛡 button (purple). Available for guard, field, manager and security manager.
Select type, fill in asset ID (e.g. S.315761), shift and location.
For Robbery/Attempt, fill in suspect description for real-time alerts.
Add up to 2 photos and the police report number.
In the panel, use the search field to find incidents by asset ID.
passos.dica: Filter works in real time.

passos.desc: Tap Guard in the map header to open the side panel.
Filter by Robbery, Vandalism, Attempt, etc.
Use the search field to find incidents for a specific scooter.
Tap the incident then Edit/Resolve to update status or add notes.

A slot is a work shift assigned to one or more agents. It groups tasks (points to visit), defines schedule, zone and type: Charger (battery swap) or Scout (redistribute scooters). The agent accepts, checks in with a photo and executes each task.
passos.dica: Every slot has an acceptance deadline. If no one accepts in time, the system escalates via Telegram.

passos.desc: Go to 📦 Slots → ➕ Create tab. Choose type (Scout or Charger), fill in title, shift times, zone, acceptance deadline and (optionally) assign an operator. Add tasks with destination, quantity and priority. Click ✓ Create Slot.
passos.dica: Leaving the Operator field empty keeps the slot open for any agent in the city to accept.

passos.desc: In 📦 Slots → 🤖 Auto-slots tab, create a config per zone. Set quantity thresholds (min, target, max) and battery threshold. The engine runs every 15 min automatically and creates slots.
passos.dica: Empty points generate urgent slots. Excess scooters generate redistribution scouts.

passos.desc: In the zone config, ⏰ Windows tab: define time windows with their own parameters — e.g. morning peak 07h-09h with target 12, night 22h-00h with reduced target. The active window overrides global values.
passos.dica: Cross-midnight windows are supported. The one with the highest numeric priority wins overlaps.

passos.desc: In the Operators per slot field of the zone config, set N. The engine finds the N nearest available agents and distributes tasks alternating between agents: task 1→A, task 2→B, task 3→A…
passos.dica: Use 2+ operators in large zones or when many critical points appear simultaneously.

passos.desc: Enable Include off-point scooters in the config. The engine detects scooters parked outside any point and generates 📍 Return to [Point X] tasks, grouping scooters within a 0.5 km radius.
In the 📋 Slots tab, each card shows status, operator, progress and acceptance deadline. Click to expand and see all tasks. Flashing orange card = deadline expiring soon.
passos.dica: Use the status filter at the top (Open / In progress / Done) to focus on active slots.

passos.desc: In the expanded card, click ✏ Reassign to change the operator without losing history. To cancel, click ✕ Cancel and state the reason — the operator gets push + Telegram automatically.
passos.dica: Cancelled slots cannot be reopened. Create a new one if needed.

passos.desc: In 📦 Slots → 👥 Team tab, see all operators in the city with their current status (free, in slot, offline). Click to view history and completion rate.
The engine sorts scooters from most critical (lowest battery) to least. Bikes below 10% get urgent priority. Tasks are grouped by GoJet point.
passos.dica: Battery threshold is configurable per zone and per time window. Default: 40%.

passos.desc: Empty → urgent, refill full target. Low (<50%) → high, fill the gap. Excess (>120%) → normal, redistribute surplus. All types go in ONE slot, ordered by urgency.
If a slot stays unaccepted past the deadline, the system escalates: Telegram to the managers group, increased priority and a new dispatch to the next available operators.
passos.dica: Configure the acceptance deadline per zone. Manual slots also have a deadline field at creation.

passos.desc: With 👥 Field active, see agents on the map. Green = GPS < 90s. Yellow = 90s-5min. Red = >5min. Click a pin to fly to their position.
passos.dica: In the task detail view, the mini-map shows the agent's distance to the destination in real time.

passos.desc: In 📦 Slots → 📂 History tab, filter by period, type, zone and status. Click ⬇ CSV to export — opens directly in Excel.
Work shifts for logistics agents with defined schedule, zone and role.
In the Slots tab, see available slots and tap Accept.
At shift time, tap Check-in. GPS activates automatically.
passos.dica: Allow location all the time for background GPS.

passos.desc: In the Tasks tab, see priority-ordered points. Tap to see address and navigate.
Start task > go to point > take photo > Mark as done.
When done, tap Check-out to stop GPS.
Tap the 🛴 button on the right side.
🔴 Empty · 🟠 <50% · 🟡 50–85% · 🔵 On target capacity (85–120%) · 🟢 Excess (>120%)
passos.dica: Points with target capacity = circle. Without target capacity = grey square.

passos.desc: 🟢 Available · 🟡 In rental · ⚫ Reserved · 🔴 Maintenance · 🟣 Workshop (not counted) · 🟠 Low battery
Tap 📊 bottom-left: empty points, below target, bikes by status.
🟢 Data < 3min · 🟡 3–8min · 🔴 > 8min ago.
All · 🔴 Empty · 🟠 < goal · 🔵 On target capacity · 🟢 Excess · 🔗 M1/M2/M3
passos.dica: 🔗 M1/M2/M3 = distance to the nearest JET OS station (M1 closest, M3 farthest, within 150m).

passos.desc: ⚠️ Out of point · 🟠 Low battery · 🟢 Available.
Tap 👥 Field to see online operators. Tap name to fly to their position.
Chrome > menu > Add to home screen.
Safari > Share > Add to Home Screen.
Grant location access all the time for background GPS.
passos.dica: Disable battery optimization for the app in Settings > Apps.

passos.desc: App updates automatically. Close and reopen if changes don't appear.
Tap the 🔍 button then 📍 to load points from OpenStreetMap.
Tap 🎯 to open the candidate points panel.
passos.dica: Adjust Gap Radius, Area Radius and Min Score to calibrate suggestions.

passos.desc: Charging Bases, Service Centers, Warehouses and Redistribution Points — where scooters are charged, repaired or stored.
Tap the 🏭 button. Pins appear with icon by type.
passos.dica: Tap any pin to edit the location.

passos.desc: With 🏭 active, tap 📍 and tap the map. The form opens with name, type, photo, capacity and responsible.
Tap 💳 to open the financial panel. Select a location and month to see payments.
passos.dica: For energy, previous + current reading calculates the value automatically.

passos.desc: Tap the ⬡ button then 'New zone'. Tap the map to add vertices.
Tap '📂 KMZ' to import zones from a Google My Maps file. Stations are ignored — only polygons are imported.
Select a zone and tap 'Edit vertices' to drag the points.
Set name, group, phase, color and priority.
The system monitors field operators' GPS and sends automatic alerts via Telegram.
If an operator doesn't arrive at the point within 20 minutes of starting the task, Telegram notifies the manager with the current distance.
If a task runs for more than 30 minutes without completing, an alert is sent with progress (e.g. 3/5 delivered).
If an operator with an active task goes more than 10 minutes without sending GPS, Telegram alerts to check the app.
passos.dica: Configure in Settings → Apps → JET OS → Battery → No restriction.

passos.desc: Alerts have a 30-minute cooldown to prevent spam. The same operator/task won't trigger repeated alerts before that.
Tap the 🛡 button. Fill in type, description, location and photos. Telegram receives automatic notifications for Robbery, Vandalism and Attempt. Recovery also notifies Telegram.
Vandalism, Robbery, Attempt, Recovery, Other. Robberies appear in the Robberies Panel. Vandalism has extra damage assessment fields (%, R$).
When editing a Vandalism incident, fill in '% Damage' (0–100) and 'Value R$' after workshop assessment. These appear in Guard Dashboard and Report.
Each saved change (status, type, asset, report, searching) is recorded in the incident history with user name, changed field and timestamp. Visible in the edit modal.
In the Guard mobile screen, the 🔍 Wanted tab lists all assets marked as wanted. Search by asset ID, city or type.
In the Guard map panel, city chips appear above the list. Tap to filter incidents from the desired city.
The '📊 Guard Dash' button in the header shows Robberies, Vandalism, R$ damage, BRPD losses, recovery rate and weekly trend.
Open incidents show a '🔓 2h30m' badge indicating how long they've been open. Yellow < 6h, orange > 6h, red > 1 day.
'Send Report' in Guard Dashboard sends to Telegram: PT-BR + RU message and 4-page PDF. P1: Robberies PT. P2: Robberies RU. P3: Vandalism. P4: Losses and full appendix.
The 'gestor_seg' role accesses Guard, Guard Analytics, Guard Dashboard and Robberies Panel. Can approve contractor records. No access to stations or slots.
Tap 🔴 Robberies in the map buttons. Available for manager, gestor_seg and admin. Red pins appear on the map when Guard opens.
Total robberies, recovered, recovery rate, open wanted. Filters: 7d / 30d / 90d / all. Search by asset ID, city or description.
Sent at 7am Tuesday–Sunday to the Telegram group. Reports the previous day. On Monday it sends the weekly report (Sun → Sat of the previous week).
'Send Report' button in Guard Dashboard. Immediately generates and sends the 4-page executive PDF plus PT-BR + RU message.

P1 PT: Open robberies (no recovered), KPIs, city table, 24h details. P2 RU: same info in Russian. P3: Vandalism with R$ and % damage. P4: BRPD losses, general KPIs and full appendix with clickable photos.
Yesterday shows the real date (e.g. 09/06). Current month shows the range (e.g. 01/06 to 09/06). Accumulated shows the year range of data (e.g. 2023–2026).
Click '🚚 Logistics' in the header.
Admin: dropdown at top. Manager: sees only their assigned city.
passos.dica: To change the manager's city, ask an admin to edit the user profile.

passos.desc: Live KPIs: operators online, pending tasks, today slots. Weather alert via Open-Meteo.
Scheduled CLT vs clock-in today. ✅ Came / ❌ Absent / 😴 Day off / ⏳ Waiting.
Live GPS with 8h history for anti-fraud. Distances detect GPS spoofing.
Batch creation. Weather forecast warns about rain before Scout slots.
passos.dica: Auto-confirmation: reminder 120min, re-check 90min, reopen 60min without response.

passos.desc: Filter by type. Reassignment with distance per operator. XLSX and PDF export.
Temporary suspension with countdown. Alert for expiries within 3 days.
Direct send by city/group. Role templates. Mass slot confirmation.
passos.dica: Configure Chat ID in Config → Telegram.

passos.desc: Click 📊 next to 🛴 button. Available for manager and admin.
Distribution bars by status, scooter stats, online operators and full color legend.
Table: status, available, physical, target capacity, occupation %, M1/M2/M3 badge (distance to nearest JET OS station).
passos.dica: Sort by Status (critical first), Name A-Z or Quantity.

passos.desc: 🔴 Empty · 🟠 <50% · 🟡 50–85% · 🔵 On target capacity · 🟢 Excess. Search by name.
Clickable KPIs. ID, visual battery, at point or out, sub-status.
GPS: 🟢<5min / 🟡<15min / 🟠<30min. Exact time. Google Maps link.
On first access, you accept the JET OS Terms of Use and Privacy Policy. Your acceptance is recorded with date and time.
passos.dica: When the terms are updated, the app asks for a new acceptance automatically.

passos.desc: Field profiles (logistics, charger, scalt, guard and providers) also accept a specific GPS consent, under the Brazilian LGPD (Law 13.709/2018), before starting.
Your location is only recorded DURING shifts, slots and tasks — from start to end. Outside these periods, there is no collection.
Proving the performance of activities, safety of the operator and assets, and logistics optimization. Data is not sold or used outside working hours.
You can request access, correction or deletion of your data and revoke consent at any time. Revoking ends tracking.
passos.dica: To exercise your rights or contact the data protection officer (DPO), reach out to Jet management.

passos.desc: Click on "📊 Analytics" and drag the Excel file exported from the system.
The map shows start and end routes of each ride with intensity by volume.
Use the toolbar buttons to switch between Heatmap, Hexbins, Arcs and Points.
Click "🏔 3D" to tilt the map. Hold Ctrl + drag to rotate.
passos.dica: Combine the Hexbin 3D mode with Zones to identify high-demand neighborhoods.

passos.desc: In "📋 Dash" → Reports, select a station and click "Generate PDF".
In Dash → Guard, use the filters and click "Export Excel".
Click the 👥 icon in the header. Approve requests by setting the role. Security Manager: role gestor_seg.
In Dash → Guard → Config (admin only), configure which incident types trigger alerts.
passos.dica: The bot needs the token configured in Cloud Functions.

passos.desc: Click the 📦 Tasks button on the side FABs. Available for logistics, field, manager and admin.
The 🏠 Home tab shows your status (working/idle), shift time and active tasks. Tap "▶ Start work + Photo" to begin.
In the ➕ Create tab, select "🛴 GoJet Point" to see the live list sorted by deficit. Empty ones appear at the top with a ZERO badge.
passos.dica: Enable the "🔴 Critical only" filter to see only points below 50% of the target.

passos.desc: Click any station on the map and tap "📦 + Create task" in the popup. Name and coordinates are filled automatically.
With the GoJet overlay active, click a P point and tap "+ Create task". The point is preselected with the calculated deficit.
Tasks are generated automatically every hour for GoJet points below 50% of the target. They appear with an AUTO badge on the kanban.
In the 📊 Kanban tab, click ⊞ to expand fullscreen. On desktop, columns are side by side.
In a task's detail, click 🎯 — an orange banner appears on the map. Click any GoJet P to set the new destination.
passos.dica: Only available for manager/admin.

passos.desc: The 📈 Stats tab shows: completion rate, average duration, agent ranking with gold/silver/bronze, top most-served points.
The 📂 History tab has filters by status, type, agent and search. Click ⬇ CSV to export with BOM (opens directly in Excel).
When assigning a task, the agent receives native push (Android FCM) and Telegram simultaneously.

fab.svCombo: SV + Measure combo (generate SV then measure)

sv.replaceWithReal: Tap to zoom · replace with real photo
sv.batchConfirm: Generate Street View for {{count}} stations without photo visible on the map?
sv.batchProgress: SV batch: {{ok}} ok, {{fail}} no coverage, {{remaining}} remaining...
sv.batchDone: SV batch done: {{ok}} generated, {{fail}} no coverage
sv.comboConfirm: Combo: {{svCount}} SV to generate + {{medirCount}} measurements. Continue?

medir.batchEmpty: All visible stations with photo already have measurements

foto.title: Station photo
foto.subtitle: Select a photo for this station
foto.pasteHint: Tip: take a screenshot (Win+Shift+S), then click Paste
foto.noClipboard: No image in clipboard. Copy the image first (Print/Ctrl+C).

permissions.locationDesc: Required for shift registration, field GPS and proximity-based task assignment.
permissions.locationAlwaysDesc: Tap Allow and choose "Allow all the time". Without this, GPS stops when the app is minimized.
permissions.notificationsDesc: Receive alerts for new tasks, slot updates and team messages in real time.
permissions.cameraDesc: Required for shift entry photo and incident reporting.
permissions.backgroundDesc: Keeps GPS active with screen locked. Without this, tracking stops when the phone sleeps.
permissions.intro: To work correctly, the app needs the permissions below.
permissions.denied: Denied. Go to Settings → Apps → JET OS → Permissions → Location → "Allow all the time"
permissions.deniedHint: Tap 🔄 above after granting. Or open settings directly:
permissions.grantAll: Grant all permissions above to continue.

appShell.awaitApprovalProvider: Wait for admin approval. You will receive an email with next steps.
appShell.awaitApprovalInternal: Wait for admin approval. You will receive an email with access instructions.
appShell.selectRoleHint: Select your role to see the required fields.
appShell.telegramHint: After approval, you will receive instructions to connect Telegram.
appShell.cltHint: The responsible manager will follow your probation period and schedule in-person training. Renewal or termination will be communicated before the end of the period.
appShell.companyReasonPlaceholder: E.g.: I'm part of the field team at company X
appShell.firstAccessHint: First access — set a secure personal password
appShell.tempPasswordHint: 💡 Use the temporary password received via WhatsApp in the "Current password" field. After confirming, it will be replaced by your personal password.
appShell.wrongPassword: Wrong current password. Use the temporary password received via WhatsApp.
appShell.logoutAndBack: ← Log out and sign in again

streetviewModal.captureHint: Opens in new window for you to take a screenshot
streetviewModal.footerSV: Navigate by dragging. Click 📸 Capture frame to open in new window and screenshot easily.
streetviewModal.footerSat: Satellite zoom 19. To save: take a screenshot and click "Use photo/print".

form.teamExample: E.g.: I'm part of company X's field team

popup.dataNotRegistered: Business data not registered — click Edit
popup.tapZoomReplace: Tap to zoom · replace with real photo
